name: RunReveal
description: RunReveal — Security data lake and detection platform ingesting cloud logs for cost-efficient SIEM at scale.

seo.title: RunReveal — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec
seo.meta_description: RunReveal: RunReveal — Security data lake and detection platform ingesting cloud logs for cost-efficient SIEM at scale.

when_to_use: Cost-efficient SIEM on cloud log data via security data lake
Detection engineering with SQL-based threat hunting queries
CloudTrail and GCP audit log ingestion for security monitoring
Sigma rule deployment for SOC detection use cases
Incident investigation via unified log search across cloud envs

pros: Data lake model cuts SIEM ingestion costs dramatically
Fast query performance over massive log volumes
Flexible schema handles diverse cloud log sources
cons: Younger product, fewer integrations than Splunk or Elastic
Requires data-engineering mindset to operate well
Compliance-specific reporting thinner than legacy SIEMs
review.verdict: Cost-sane SIEM alternative for cloud-native teams willing to build; not a plug-and-play replacement.
review.best_for: Cloud-heavy security teams tired of Splunk bills who can own detection engineering.
review.not_for: Traditional SOCs wanting extensive out-of-box content, compliance packs, and GUI-driven workflows.
